title: Erratum: Correction for affiliation of 3rd author Randomized comparison of caregivers' ability to use epinephrine autoinjectors and prefilled syringes for anaphylaxis.
authors: Asian Pacific Journal of Allergy and Immunology
author_string: Asian Pacific Journal of Allergy and Immunology
journal_full: Asian Pacific journal of allergy and immunology
abstract: Corrected affiliation of 3rd author Pediatric Allergy & Clinical Immunology Research Unit, Division of Allergy and Immunology, Department of Pediatrics, Faculty of Medicine, Chulalongkorn University, King Chulalongkorn Memorial Hospital, the Thai Red Cross Society, Bangkok, Thailand.
